name: Southwestern Electric Cooperative
netMeteringProgram: Net Metering at Avoided Cost Rate

ruleReferences.requirement: Must comply with NM PRC interconnection standards
Excess energy credited at avoided cost rate
Battery and generator systems must comply with NEC 445.18

disconnectRequirements.notes: SWEC requires utility-accessible, lockable AC disconnect at or near the meter

labelingRequirements: SWEC requires 'SOLAR ELECTRIC SYSTEM CONNECTED' placard at main panel
notes: Southwestern Electric Cooperative serves SW Illinois. Application fee: $50 for systems ≤10kW; $50 + $1/kW for systems >10kW. Members responsible for 100% of upgrade costs if distribution circuit upgrades required. Excess energy credited at SWEC Avoided Cost Rate (filed annually with NMPRC). RECs no longer purchased by SWEC.
